theme: one furnace schedule to forge many alloys
title: One Furnace, Many Alloys: Shared Addition-Chain Batch Exponentiation
strategies: independent square-and-multiply per exponent, no sharing (trivial = baseline)
one shared g,g^2,g^4,... square table + binary assembly per exponent (greedy)
recover hidden modulus m, decompose e=q*m+r, share one g^m chain + residue table (strong)
jointly optimal addition sequence over the whole batch below the residue split (open ceiling, uncovered)
